ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for whom the project is being done */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "thread_code" TEXT /* Code of the thread (e.g., DMC 470) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the thread */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the thread (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the thread */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the thread in stock */,
  "price_per_meter" REAL /* Price per meter of the thread */,
  "thread_thickness" TEXT /* Thickness of the thread (e.g., 3-ply, 6-ply) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the thread is sourced */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stitches" (
  "stitch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stitch type */,
  "stitch_name" TEXT /* Name of the stitch (e.g., Cross-stitch, Backstitch) */,
  "stitch_description" TEXT /* Description of the stitch */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity level of the stitch (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "average_time_per_stitch" REAL /* Average time (in minutes) required to complete one stitch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_threads" (
  "project_thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-thread relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread */,
  "total_length_in_2_threads" REAL /* Total length of thread used in 2 threads */,
  "total_length_in_1_thread" REAL /* Total length of thread used in 1 thread */,
  "stitches" INTEGER /* Total number of stitches */,
  "backstitches" INTEGER /* Total number of backstitches */,
  "estimated_usage" REAL /* Estimated total length of thread required for the project */,
  "actual_usage" REAL /* Actual total length of thread used for the project */,
  "waste_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of thread wasted during the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_threads_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_threads_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Project Manager, Designer, Quality Control) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Update, Insert, Delete) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change was made */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
